daily_record.title: Daily record
daily_record.description: Record the child's day clearly and with reflection.

fields.label: Mood and presentation
fields.help: What did adults observe and what might the child have been communicating?

fields.label: Child voice
fields.help: Record the child's own words, wishes or feelings where known.

fields.label: Staff response
fields.help: What did adults do and was this in line with the plan?

fields.label: Therapeutic reflection
fields.help: What may this tell us about need, risk, regulation, relationship or support?

fields.label: Follow-up actions
fields.help: What needs to happen next and who needs to know?

incident.title: Incident record
incident.description: Separate fact, child voice, professional judgement, staff reflection and manager review.

document_review.title: Document review
document_review.description: Review, comment, approve or request changes with a clear audit trail.
